title: Cast metadata sidecar
description: Sidecar metadata for an asciinema .cast recording: title, summary, and chapters. Conventionally stored next to the recording as <name>.meta.json. Two invariants are beyond JSON Schema and are enforced by the beecast/seecast validators: chapters are STRICTLY ascending by `t`, and when chapters are present the first one MUST have `t` exactly 0.

title.description: Short human title for the recording; shown as the page title and header. Omit the field rather than passing an empty string.

summary.description: One- or two-sentence description of what the recording shows; rendered under the title.

chapters.description: Chapter markers, strictly ascending by `t`. When non-empty, the first chapter MUST start at t = 0 so the opening segment always has a marker.

t.description: The timekey: seconds into the recording. Fractional values are allowed (e.g. 12.5). The first chapter's timekey MUST be exactly 0.

title.description: Short chapter title; 3-6 words works best.
